headline: INSPECTION-READY FROM PAGE ONE
subheading: Structure your Site Master File to EU GMP Part III and keep it audit-ready.
flux_prompt: An elegant editorial still-life evoking a pharmaceutical site master file, viewed at a shallow angle across a polished deep-navy surface in a calm quality office. A slim closed document folder sits in soft focus beside a faint architectural site-plan blueprint and a sleek tablet displaying abstract glowing schematic lines, suggesting structured chapters and controlled documentation. Cool teal and cyan light rakes gently from the left, with a single fresh-green accent glowing softly from a screen edge, conveying order, accuracy and quiet authority. Delicate reflections, smooth navy gradients dissolving into shadow, shallow depth of field, clinical-luxury mood, premium and precise. 1500x900 composition, 5:3 aspect ratio, professional editorial illustration, premium quality, clean composition, modern visual storytelling, professional lighting, no text, no watermark, no logo, ultra detailed
